segments.text: [Music]
reply to count the attack chain to
compromise mail spring formerly known as
nyus mail mail spring is a popular email
client application that gives users a
fast and efficient way to managed their
email accounts it is a free and open-
Source program for Windows Mac and Linux
operating systems the sonar
vulnerability research team discovered a
critical vulnerability in M spring this
vulnerability tracked us cve 2023 474 79
can allow tax to bypass the mitigations
to achieve remote code execution when a
user replies to or forwards a malicious
email for this demonstration we are
using the mail spring version
1.10.0 the initial email sent in this
attack consists of a malicious inline
image which will automatically be saved
in a temporary location using known CSS
exploitation techniques an attacker can
leak the randomized downloaded image
path
[Music]
[Music]
[Applause]
[Music]
the second email uses an
mxssi pass to execute code in the main
window by pointing to the leaked file
sent in the first email when the victim
tries to reply or forward the email our
payload will execute and a calculator
will pop up the maintainer only
addressed the CSP misconfiguration as a
version
1.10 you can catch all the technical
details on this vulnerability at Sonos
source.com
[Music]
blog

fullText: [Music] reply to count the attack chain to compromise mail spring formerly known as nyus mail mail spring is a popular email client application that gives users a fast and efficient way to managed their email accounts it is a free and open- Source program for Windows Mac and Linux operating systems the sonar vulnerability research team discovered a critical vulnerability in M spring this vulnerability tracked us cve 2023 474 79 can allow tax to bypass the mitigations to achieve remote code execution when a user replies to or forwards a malicious email for this demonstration we are using the mail spring version 1.10.0 the initial email sent in this attack consists of a malicious inline image which will automatically be saved in a temporary location using known CSS exploitation techniques an attacker can leak the randomized downloaded image path [Music] [Music] [Applause] [Music] the second email uses an mxssi pass to execute code in the main window by pointing to the leaked file sent in the first email when the victim tries to reply or forward the email our payload will execute and a calculator will pop up the maintainer only addressed the CSP misconfiguration as a version 1.10 you can catch all the technical details on this vulnerability at Sonos source.com [Music] blog
